title: symphyotrichum ciliatum
intro: Symphyotrichum ciliatum, also known as the long-leaved bone-set or long-leaved aster, is a perennial plant in the sunflower family native to eastern North America. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, making it useful in treating wounds and skin conditions. The health benefits of Symphyotrichum ciliatum include reducing inflammation, improving digestion, and supporting immune function. The plant can be prepared as an infusion, tincture, or salve, and is often used to treat a range of ailments, including fever, sore throats, and skin irritations.
